title: Blueprint
description: The top-level Blueprint artifact. Normative prose: docs/specs/vocabulary/blueprint.md. This schema encodes well-formedness (structural shape, required fields, enums, extension-namespace passthrough). Validity — entry resolves to a composed compound, signature.mark resolves to a mark, same-id-different-canonical-form conflicts, imports resolve — is left to engines.

blueprint.description: Specification version this document conforms to. SemVer 2.0.0; documents targeting a draft specification carry a `-draft` suffix.

id.description: Stable identifier for this Blueprint. URI per RFC 3986; URN form under an author- or publisher-controlled namespace is recommended.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Absent means draft. Full rules in docs/specs/vocabulary/draft.md.

compounds.description: Object of compound declarations keyed by document-local name. The interior shape of a compound is not locked in 0.1.0-draft and is finalized in a later round; engines MUST preserve unknown fields.

entry.description: Name of the compound in `compounds` that is the Blueprint's root of execution. Exactly one. That the name resolves to a composed compound with no parameters is a validity rule enforced by engines.

schemas.description: Top-level named schemas addressable by `#/schemas/<name>`. Each value MUST be a valid JSON Schema 2020-12 document; this schema does not re-validate the dialect here.

imports.description: External Blueprints and registries this Blueprint depends on. Each entry binds an alias to a reference and a version pin. Detailed pin format is in docs/specs/vocabulary/compound.md §6.2 and is deliberately light-touch in 0.1.0-draft.

marks.description: Ordered authorship trace. Array order is authoritative.

signatures.description: Cryptographic proofs committing marks or the whole Blueprint.

metadata.description: Unstructured informational fields. Engines MUST NOT attribute runtime behavior to anything in this object.

alias.description: Local alias for the imported Blueprint. Unique within this Blueprint.

ref.description: Reference to the imported artifact: a Blueprint `id`, a registry URI, or a URL.

pin.description: Version pin per docs/specs/vocabulary/compound.md §6.2. Engines MUST fail the load if an import resolves to a different canonical form than the pin commits to.
